---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for mDone
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Description**
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

**Use Case**
Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

**Vikunja API**
If applicable, mention the relevant Vikunja API endpoints (see the [API docs](https://vikunja.io/docs/api/)).

**Additional Context**
Any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request.
